fields.customfield_10103: [DigitalKey] Changing the signal sent and received when changing the owner's smart phone
fields.customfield_14914:
* Video report: [^changeOwnerKey.mp4]
 * RS: [https://acb.lge.com/cb/issue/40772519]
 * SAD: [https://acb.lge.com/cb/issue/32603384]
 * SDD: [https://acb.lge.com/cb/issue/38906633]
 * Sanity file: [^CDC_SanityTest_Digital_Key_V4.xlsx]
 * Test steps:
 ** Step1: IVI ON
 ** Step2: Send signal '0x8: Owner key change start condition satisfied' to IVI the first time
 ** Step3: Send signal '0x8: Owner key change start condition satisfied' to IVI the second time
 ** Step4: Verify logs 
DigitalKeyPropertyHelper  D  handleUserVkMenuGen2 case 0x8 hit count: 1
DigitalKeyPropertyHelper D  handleUserVkMenuGen2 case 0x8 hit count: 2
NissanCarDigitalKeyService I onOwnerKeyChangeStart
NissanCarDigitalKeyService I setIVI_VK_Menu_operation_v2Property success with value: 6
fields.customfield_12359:
Change the signal to be received and transmitted after [Continue Setup] is pressed. when changing owner smartphone. ​

Before:
Using Key Registration CAN signal for Change SP owner.
VKM→IVI
0x5 : Registration Start Condition satisfied
0x4 : Registration Start Condition not satisfied - keyfob_VehicleStates
IVI→VKM
0b0100 : Owner key registration start

After:
Using Change SP owner CAN signal for Change SP owner.
VKM→IVI
0x8 : Owner Key Change Start Condition satisfied
0x7 : Owner Key Change Start Condition not satisfied - keyfob_VehicleStates
IVI→VKM
0b0110 : Owner key change start

Please refer the detail from page8-10
fields.customfield_14748:
【2025/12/22 XM8】
P3 Team3 plan this at PI29 SP2
fields.customfield_13538: This ticket type "New request" is obsolete! Please change the ticket type above ↑
fields.summary: [DigitalKey] Changing the signal sent and received when changing the owner's smart phone

comments.body: Reopen to discuss in PI29 PIP.

Hello [~N200392] -san,
This ticket requires both works from LGE and HMI.
In short, HMI will trigger a new API on platform side (LGE) to send this signal to VKM: IVI_VK_Menu_operation_v2: 0b0110 (Owner key change start) 
I created a children story ticket to implement the new API on the platform side, so CRQ is required for this ticket.

Hello [~BSBE-TDB]-san, 
Currenly, the platform side haven't discussed this new API with HMI yet. I kindly request HMI team to create a story ticket to confirm the final design of the new API. When the design of new API is agreed, we will start estimating and fill the plan.

Thank you!

I uploaded test reports in 'Result' section
!image-2026-03-24-14-58-28-187.png|width=604,height=258!
